title: Fix version-scoped score procedure list
description: In the scorecards dashboard, the selected score version shows evaluations but not associated procedures. Investigate and fix version-scoped procedure matching/loading.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Fixed version-scoped score procedure list by making loadOptimizerRuns paginate all procedures for the score before client-side version filtering. This prevents older procedure manifests from being omitted when a selected score version was touched outside the first query page. Also removed a duplicate champion metadata update call introduced during merge resolution. Validation: dashboard npm run typecheck passed.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Found the remaining root cause: Procedure.metadata was parsed, but nested metadata.optimizer_artifacts can be stored as a JSON string. The frontend treated it as an object, so manifestKey was missing, manifests did not load, and version-scoped filtering could not see optimizer-touched version IDs. Patched frontend manifest loading to parse nested optimizer_artifacts and made manifest version matching exact-recursive across manifest values.
